issue.body:
**Spec:** docs/specs/2026-05-24-hyphen-ngrams-sqlite.md

Add `pd_book_tools.hyphen_ngrams.HyphenNgramsClient` Protocol with `SqliteClient`
(pre-indexed, download-on-first-use from a GitHub Release asset) and `JsonApiClient`
(unofficial Google Books fallback). Replaces the unofficial JSON endpoint with a
deterministic local SQLite for hyphen-pair frequency data.

**Gates:** pd-prep-for-pgdp Stage 15 SQLite migration (Decision #2 in design-handoff spec).
**Design source:** `pd-ui/docs/templates/design_handoff_pd_ui/wf05/NOTES.md`.

nodes.description: Design issue with a spec doc
nodes.name: kind:spec

issue.title: Spec: hyphen n-grams SQLite migration

issue.body:
Source spec: docs/specs/2026-05-24-hyphen-ngrams-sqlite.md
Section: §6.1 Protocol definition
Tracks: #210

Define HyphenNgramsClient Protocol (matches HyphenNgramsClient adapter interface named in pd-prep-for-pgdp design-handoff spec) and FreqResult dataclass. Field-level unit tests.
issue.title: hyphen-ngrams: HyphenNgramsClient Protocol + FreqResult dataclass

issue.body:
Source spec: docs/specs/2026-05-24-hyphen-ngrams-sqlite.md
Section: §6.2 SQLite schema
Tracks: #210

Implement SqliteClient: SQLite schema with decade-bucketed hyphen_freq[1700..2020] and joined_freq[1700..2020] columns. Implements HyphenNgramsClient Protocol. Unit tests against a fixture DB.
issue.title: hyphen-ngrams: SQLite schema + SqliteClient implementation

issue.body:
Source spec: docs/specs/2026-05-24-hyphen-ngrams-sqlite.md
Section: §6 Decision (JSON fallback path)
Tracks: #210

Implement JsonApiClient using the unofficial Google Books JSON endpoint, exposing same HyphenNgramsClient Protocol. Throttle-aware retry behaviour. Mocked-network unit tests.
issue.title: hyphen-ngrams: JsonApiClient (unofficial endpoint fallback)

issue.body:
Source spec: docs/specs/2026-05-24-hyphen-ngrams-sqlite.md
Section: §6.3 Download URL convention
Tracks: #210

Implement download-on-first-use for the SQLite DB from a versioned GitHub Release asset, cached at platformdirs user-data path. Integrity check + version pinning. Unit tests covering cache hit / miss / corrupt.
issue.title: hyphen-ngrams: download-on-first-use mechanism + URL convention

issue.body:
Source spec: docs/specs/2026-05-24-hyphen-ngrams-sqlite.md
Section: §6.4 Extraction pipeline + §8 Test Plan
Tracks: #210

Build scripts/build_hyphen_ngrams_db.py: download Google Books Ngrams raw corpus subset, extract hyphen pairs, write SQLite DB. End-to-end smoke test on a tiny synthetic corpus.
issue.title: hyphen-ngrams: extraction pipeline script + unit tests
